---
title: "Adverse Events Summary — CDISC Pilot 01"
date: today
format:
  dashboard
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages

# install.packages(c("tidyverse","reactable", "htmltools", "cards", "tfrmt"))

library(tidyverse)
library(reactable)
library(htmltools)
library(cards) # for creating analysis result displays
library(tfrmt) # for formatting tables in R
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
adsl <- read_csv("adsl.csv")
adae <- read_csv("adae.csv")
```

# Tab 1

## Row 1

### Maximum AE severity by treatment arm

```{r}
#| label: build-patient-table
severity_levels <- c("NONE", "MILD", "MODERATE", "SEVERE")

max_severity <- adae |>
  group_by(USUBJID) |>
  summarise(MAX_SEV = severity_levels[max(as.integer(ASEVN) + 1)])

patient_table <- adsl |>
  select(USUBJID, TRT01P) |>
  left_join(max_severity, by = "USUBJID") |>
  mutate(
    MAX_SEV = replace_na(MAX_SEV, "NONE"),
    MAX_SEV = factor(MAX_SEV, levels = severity_levels, ordered = TRUE)
  )
```

```{r}
#| label: chart-1
severity_fill_colors <- c(
  "NONE"     = "white",
  "MILD"     = "#a1c5e7",
  "MODERATE" = "#61a1d7",
  "SEVERE"   = "#274c77"
)

plot_data <- patient_table |>
  mutate(
    TRT01P = recode(TRT01P,
      "Placebo"              = "Placebo",
      "Xanomeline High Dose" = "Xano. High",
      "Xanomeline Low Dose"  = "Xano. Low"
    ),
    TRT01P = factor(TRT01P, levels = c("Placebo", "Xano. Low", "Xano. High"))
  ) |>
  count(TRT01P, MAX_SEV) |>
  group_by(TRT01P) |>
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n))

plot_data |>
  filter(MAX_SEV != "NONE") |>
  ggplot(aes(x = TRT01P, y = prop, fill = MAX_SEV)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent_format(), limits = c(0, 1)) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = severity_fill_colors,
    breaks = c("MILD", "MODERATE", "SEVERE")
  ) +
  labs(
    title = "Proportion of patients by maximum AE severity",
    x = "Treatment arm",
    y = "Proportion of patients",
    fill = "Max severity"
  ) +
  theme_bw()
```

## Row 2

### Adverse events by patient count

```{r}
#| label: ae-table
ae_table <- adae |>
  distinct(USUBJID, AEDECOD) |>
  count(AEDECOD, name = "n_patients") |>
  arrange(desc(n_patients))

arm_counts_wide <- adae |>
  distinct(USUBJID, AEDECOD, ARM) |>
  count(AEDECOD, ARM) |>
  pivot_wider(names_from = ARM, values_from = n, values_fill = 0)

ae_react2 <- ae_table |>
  left_join(arm_counts_wide, by = "AEDECOD") |>
  rename(
    Total    = n_patients,
    XanoLow  = `Xanomeline Low Dose`,
    XanoHigh = `Xanomeline High Dose`
  )

global_max <- max(ae_react2$Total)

bar_cell_left <- function(color, gmax, bar_px = 100) {
  function(value) {
    w <- round(value / gmax * bar_px)
    div(
      style = "display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:flex-start;",
      div(style = paste0(
        "background:", color, "; width:", w, "px; height:14px;",
        "border-radius:2px; flex-shrink:0;"
      )),
      span(
        style = "font-size:11px; margin-left:4px; color:#333; white-space:nowrap;",
        value
      )
    )
  }
}

reactable(
  ae_react2 |> select(AEDECOD, Total, XanoHigh, XanoLow, Placebo),
  searchable       = TRUE,
  sortable         = TRUE,
  filterable       = TRUE,
  height           = 500,
  striped          = TRUE,
  highlight        = TRUE,
  defaultSorted    = "Total",
  defaultSortOrder = "desc",
  theme = reactableTheme(
    style = list(
      fontFamily = "-apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, Oxygen, Ubuntu, Cantarell, 'Helvetica Neue', Arial, sans-serif",
      fontSize   = "14px"
    )
  ),
  columns = list(
    AEDECOD  = colDef(name = "Adverse Event", minWidth = 220, align = "left"),
    Total    = colDef(name = "Total",      minWidth = 140, align = "left", cell = bar_cell_left("#70d6ff", global_max)),
    XanoHigh = colDef(name = "Xano. High", minWidth = 140, align = "left", cell = bar_cell_left("#ff70a6", global_max)),
    XanoLow  = colDef(name = "Xano. Low",  minWidth = 140, align = "left", cell = bar_cell_left("#ff9770", global_max)),
    Placebo  = colDef(name = "Placebo",    minWidth = 140, align = "left", cell = bar_cell_left("#ffd670", global_max))
  )
)
```

# Tab 2

## Previewing table for submisision

```{r}
#| label: submissions-table

# Create an Analysis Result Display (ARD) using the {cards} package.

# Create an ARD that stacks hierarchical data of adverse events
# Grouping by treatment, system organ class, and preferred term
ae_ard <- ard_stack_hierarchical(
  data = adae,
  by = TRT01A, # Note: by variables must be present in the denominator dataset
  variables = c(AEBODSYS, AETERM),
  statistic = ~ c("n", "p"), # Calculate count and percentage
  denominator = adsl,
  id = USUBJID,
  over_variables = TRUE,
  overall = TRUE
)

# Filter adae and adsl with trt01a set to "Total" and create a new ARD for the total column
adae2 <- adae |>
  mutate(TRT01A = "Total")
adsl2 <- adsl |>
  mutate(TRT01A = "Total")

ae2_ard <- ard_stack_hierarchical(
  data = adae2,
  by = TRT01A, # Note: by variables must be present in the denominator dataset
  variables = c(AEBODSYS, AETERM),
  denominator = adsl2,
  statistic = ~ c("n", "p"),
  id = USUBJID,
  over_variables = TRUE,
  overall = TRUE
) |>
  filter(group2 == "TRT01A" | variable == "TRT01A") # filter to stats we need


# Further refine the ARD for use in tfrmt

ae3_ard <- bind_ard(ae_ard, ae2_ard) |>
  # reshape the data
  shuffle_card(fill_hierarchical_overall = "ANY EVENT") |>
  # transform group-level freqs/pcts into a singular "bigN" row
  prep_big_n(vars = "TRT01A") |>
  # for nested variables, fill any missing values with "ANY EVENT"
  prep_hierarchical_fill(vars = c("AEBODSYS", "AETERM"), fill = "ANY EVENT") |>
  mutate(TRT01A = ifelse(TRT01A == "Overall TRT01A", "Total", TRT01A))

# create ordering columns, sort by AEBODSYS
ordering_aebodsys <- ae3_ard |>
  filter(TRT01A == "Total", stat_name == "n", AETERM == "ANY EVENT") |>
  arrange(desc(stat)) |>
  mutate(ord1 = row_number()) |>
  select(AEBODSYS, ord1)

# sort by AETERM after AEBODSYS order
ordering_aeterm <- ae3_ard |>
  filter(TRT01A == "Total", stat_name == "n") |>
  group_by(AEBODSYS) |>
  arrange(desc(stat)) |>
  mutate(ord2 = row_number()) |>
  select(AEBODSYS, AETERM, ord2)

# join on our ordering columns and keep required columns
ae4_ard <- ae3_ard |>
  full_join(ordering_aebodsys, by = "AEBODSYS") |>
  full_join(ordering_aeterm, by = c("AEBODSYS", "AETERM")) |>
  select(AEBODSYS, AETERM, ord1, ord2, stat, stat_name, TRT01A)


# Creating the table with {tfrmt}

AE_T01 <- tfrmt_n_pct(
  n = "n", pct = "p",
  pct_frmt_when = frmt_when(
    "==1" ~ frmt("(100%)"),
    ">=0.995" ~ frmt("(>99%)"),
    "==0" ~ frmt(""),
    "<=0.01" ~ frmt("(<1%)"),
    "TRUE" ~ frmt("(xx.x%)", transform = ~ . * 100)
  )
) |>
  tfrmt(
    group = AEBODSYS,
    label = AETERM,
    param = stat_name,
    value = stat,
    column = TRT01A,
    sorting_cols = c(ord1, ord2),
    col_plan = col_plan(
      "System Organ Class
            Preferred Term" = AEBODSYS, Placebo, `Xanomeline High Dose`, `Xanomeline Low Dose`,
      -ord1, -ord2
    ),
    row_grp_plan = row_grp_plan(row_grp_structure(
      group_val = ".default", element_block(post_space = " ")
    )),
    big_n = big_n_structure(param_val = "bigN", n_frmt = frmt(" (N=xx)"))
  ) |>
  print_to_gt(ae4_ard)

AE_T01

# gt::gtsave(AE_T01, "AE_T01.rtf")
```
